message:
feat(unicode): Implement BiDi text resolution (UAX #9)

Add bidirectional text support for proper display of Arabic, Hebrew,
and mixed LTR/RTL text in terminal applications.

New module: src/unicode/bidi.rs
- BidiInfo struct with base_direction and per-char embedding levels
- Direction enum (Ltr, Rtl, Neutral)
- resolve_bidi() function wrapping unicode-bidi crate
- detect_base_direction() helper using first strong character
- Handles empty strings and mixed script text correctly

Dependencies:
- Add unicode-bidi = "0.3" to Cargo.toml

The implementation converts unicode-bidi's byte-indexed levels to
per-char levels for convenient terminal cell mapping. This is the
foundation for bd-1262 (BiDi text resolution task).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
